microsoft_ft: Served as **post-sale technical lead** for Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp integrations, owning end-to-end execution plans from onboarding through go-live and driving **$14M+ business impact** across resilience workloads.

Led cross-org orchestration across 14 recovery executions under executive visibility, acting as **accountable technical program lead** and bridging engineering, support, and stakeholder teams to create certainty from complex, ambiguous delivery scenarios.

Scaled Azure's resilience validation platform from a 2-person operation to a **self-service, productized system**, defining requirements and scheduling capabilities that sustained 45+ annual drills and reduced operational toil by 30%.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase program capacity by 21%, directly accelerating healthy consumption of platform workloads.

Directed a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, navigating product and engineering teams for private-preview capabilities and delivering KPI reporting to executive stakeholders.
microsoft_2023: Drove **platform adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by conducting user demos and enablement sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating usage of new tooling.

Conducted **11+ discovery workshops** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation and aligning engineering to customer-identified use cases.

Accelerated data retrieval and reduced lookup time by **83%** by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, improving platform health for internal customers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a strategic roadmap to automate critical paths and present an ROI-backed execution plan to leadership.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and report on consumption health.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit OS migration pilot by defining the technical delivery strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional stakeholder execution.

Implemented automated **CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable, repeatable delivery model.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and sustain program velocity through a complex technical transition.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly engagements through a new CRM process, improving operational governance and conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and aligning marketing spend to highest-value segments.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model improvements and a business value attribution framework directly to leadership.
